task_completion.description: Verify that a new sheet named 'EVM_Dashboard' has been created in the spreadsheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab at the bottom of the spreadsheet application labeled 'EVM_Dashboard' is visible and active.

task_completion.description: Verify that the base metrics (BAC, PV, EV, AC) are present and correctly calculated on the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells labeled BAC, PV, EV, and AC are visible with values matching the expected Month 8 totals (BAC=2,400,000; PV=1,790,000; EV=1,341,500; AC=1,469,000).

task_completion.description: Verify that the variance and performance metrics (SV, CV, SPI, CPI) are present and correctly calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells labeled SV, CV, SPI, and CPI are visible with values matching the expected calculations (SV=-448,500; CV=-127,500; SPI~0.7494; CPI~0.9132).

task_completion.description: Verify that the forecasting metrics (EAC, ETC, VAC, TCPI) are present and correctly calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells labeled EAC, ETC, VAC, and TCPI are visible with values matching the expected calculations (EAC~2,628,103; ETC~1,159,103; VAC~-228,103; TCPI~1.137).

task_completion.description: Verify that a cumulative S-curve line chart comparing Planned Value, Earned Value, and Actual Cost over the 8-month period is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line chart on the 'EVM_Dashboard' sheet showing three distinct lines (representing PV, EV, and AC) plotted over an 8-month x-axis.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI spreadsheet application to create the dashboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a spreadsheet application interface (like LibreOffice Calc) open with the file, rather than a terminal running a Python script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The chart is a native spreadsheet chart object.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart has standard spreadsheet chart formatting, selection handles, or the chart editor dialog is visible in the screenshots, proving it is not an imported static image.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values and chart are entered into actual spreadsheet cells and objects, ideally showing formula bars in some screenshots, rather than being printed in a terminal or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct Month 8 metrics for the project are: BAC = 2,400,000; Planned Value (PV) = 1,790,000; Actual Cost (AC) = 1,469,000; Earned Value (EV) = 1,341,500. Derived metrics: Cost Variance (CV) = -127,500; Schedule Variance (SV) = -448,500; Cost Performance Index (CPI) = 0.9132; Schedule Performance Index (SPI) = 0.7494. Forecasted metrics: EAC = 2,628,103; ETC = 1,159,103; VAC = -228,103; TCPI = 1.137.
